entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A near-subsistence crop grown in semiarid tropical India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on sorghum market impacts is conducted

entities.name: TECHNOLOGICAL CHANGE
entities.description: Changes in technology affecting the production and market of crops

entities.name: NEAR-SUBSISTENCE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural systems where production is primarily for local consumption with minimal surplus

entities.name: SEMIARID TROPICAL
entities.description: The climatic condition of the region in India where sorghum is grown

entities.name: DIVERSIFIED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practice involving the cultivation of multiple crops

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICALLY ISOLATED MARKETS
entities.description: Markets that are physically separated, affecting price and distribution

entities.name: PRICES
entities.description: The monetary value at which goods are traded in the market

entities.name: PRODUCER-DEMANDER INCOME LINKS
entities.description: Economic connections between those who produce the crop and those who consume it

entities.name: DYNAMIC SIMULATIONS
entities.description: A computational method used to model the behavior of a system over time

entities.name: MULTICOMMODITY MARKET MODEL
entities.description: A model used to analyze the interactions between different commodity markets

entities.name: SORGHUM PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output per unit of input for sorghum production

entities.name: CONSUMER WELFARE
entities.description: The economic well-being of the people consuming sorghum

entities.name: SORGHUM PRICE
entities.description: The market price specifically for sorghum

entities.name: OUTPUT GAIN
entities.description: The increase in total production resulting from productivity improvements

entities.name: INDUCED INPUT ALLOCATIONS
entities.description: The reallocation of resources to favor a specific crop due to market signals
